text: Still one of your best works, holy cow.. Got in trouble a few years back for writing one of these quotes from this video, I think it was this one? It's been quite awhile since anything note-worthy has happened at that school.. Even did it again not that long ago, my aunt threw it out of the car though instead. But that's beside the point, revolutionary videos you did. The Joker push sound will never leave me, the peak of comedy to me. You we're ahead of your game, but everyone says that. I don't need to express my feelings for you at this point, me in 2020 already says otherwise. If only we had you today.. But that's another thing everyone hopes, guess I'm not the only one who thinks about you these days. Your music taste will also speak 1000 words to me, found myself downloading some of them. Just my whole thing is simple.. I'm quite a biased person, but man oh man does your work speak to me. Just hope you're up to some nice stuff nowadays, which I'm positive you are
